enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his mom's house in Boulder on December 18-19, 2016, describing a late night working on a 3D modeling/tracing project (using Google Earth and Wikipedia images), taking his mom to cataract surgery, grabbing food, and struggling with sleep deprivation. He ends with a brief rant about TV drug commercials.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Drives him crazy; finds them absurd and worth satirizing
Tedious but wants to power through before losing momentum

claims.claim: He took his mom to her cataract surgery at 9:30 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After picking his mom up, they went to eat at Mass Burger.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He worked for an hour at home before passing out from exhaustion.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He woke up and has been working for the last couple of hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He started watching 'Mary Queen of Scots' last night and wants to finish it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There is no Netflix signal at his mom's house right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has a fire going and is trying to finish up his work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes to finish tracing the Forum of Titus today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds tracing tedious but wants to power through it this time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Watching TV news with his mom drives him crazy due to all the drug commercials.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to bring a list of 20 drugs to his next doctor's appointment as a joke.
